prompts.title: 动画制作布局表
新中式水墨山水海报，竖版9:16构图，东方极简美学风格， 大面积留白
prompts.prompt:
新中式水墨山水海报，竖版9:16构图，东方极简美学风格，
大面积留白，整体色调为春日清晨氛围（青绿色、雾蓝、淡灰、浅墨），低饱和、清透柔和，高级质感。
画面主体为奇峻巍峨的群山，从中间平静湖面的两侧拔地而起，占据左右两侧画面，
山体以水墨晕染表现，浓淡干湿变化丰富，局部融入淡青绿色渲染，体现春意生机。
山峰被湿润轻柔的晨雾包裹，雾气层层递进，与浅青蓝天空自然融合，形成空气透视与空间纵深。

湖面如镜面般平静，呈现微青绿色调，倒映山体与天空，反射略带柔焦与雾化扩散效果，增强春日湿润与梦幻氛围。
中景一艘带弧形篷顶的小木舟缓慢漂浮，船桨轻触水面形成细腻涟漪，水纹自然扩散，整体保持极静状态。

船上为一位红衣渔女，体量较小（远景比例），人物简化处理为水墨剪影 + 轻微设色，
身着低饱和朱砂红传统服饰（非鲜艳红），颜色略被雾气柔化，
人物面部不刻画细节，仅保留轮廓与姿态（如轻扶船篷或执桨），
红色在水面形成淡淡倒影，作为画面唯一暖色视觉焦点。

岸边点缀疏林与春季新生植被，采用淡墨 + 淡青绿点染，虚实结合，增强节奏与生命气息。

少量飞鸟在远空掠过，轻盈疏散分布，增强空间层次与灵动感。

画面顶部居中竖排书法：“东方美学”，采用传统手写行书或行草风格（王羲之笔意），
笔触自然起伏、提按分明，带飞白与墨韵扩散效果，避免字体感。
书法颜色为深墨青或柔和墨黑，与整体画面统一。
整体风格：水墨 + 现代极简设计融合，春日禅意、空灵湿润、宁静氛围，
冷暖对比克制，电影感光影，高级艺术海报质感，8K超清细节。

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - AI城市渲染对比海报
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical side-by-side comparison poster showing two AI-generated aerial city renderings, one above the other, for a visual model comparison between {argument name="top model label" default="Banana pro"} and {argument name="bottom model label" default="GPT image 2"}.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 image, approximately 768×1024 px. Split the canvas into exactly 2 equal horizontal panels with no border or margin between them.

Layout: The top panel fills the upper half and the bottom panel fills the lower half. Each panel shows a similar futuristic waterfront business district at blue-hour dusk from a high oblique aerial view. Place exactly 2 large text labels: the top label in the upper-left corner reading “Banana pro”, and the bottom label in the upper-left area of the lower panel reading “GPT image 2”. Use a tall, blocky, condensed white display font with a dark shadow or outline, similar to retro stencil/gaming typography.

Top panel scene: A polished architectural visualization of a modern urban development beside a river or bay. Include approximately 12 prominent glass office towers and mid-rise blocks arranged on a gridded campus, with glowing rooftop edges, landscaped green roofs, tree-lined roads, and warm street lighting. Show water along the top edge and lower-right edge, with distant city buildings beyond the water. Roads have orange and white light trails, creating a lively night-city effect.

Bottom panel scene: A second version of the same waterfront district, slightly darker and more dramatic, with approximately 14 prominent glass towers and mid-rise buildings. Use cooler blue glass reflections, brighter illuminated windows, stronger road-light trails, green rooftop gardens, and a river or bay curving along the top and lower-right edges. Make the composition visibly similar to the top panel but not identical, so it feels like two different AI model outputs from the same prompt.

Visual style: Hyper-detailed aerial architectural rendering, realistic but slightly idealized, cinematic dusk lighting, blue and teal shadows, warm golden streetlights, crisp glass facades, dense urban planning, marina/waterfront atmosphere, high contrast, sharp perspective, no people visible.

Constraints: Use exactly 2 stacked comparison panels and exactly 2 visible text labels. Keep the labels large, readable, and white with dark outline/shadow. Do not add logos, UI elements, watermarks, captions, or extra text.

prompts.prompt:

Keep the scenery, colors, detail, composition, vegetation, dirt clearing, rocks, and distant mountains as close to the reference as possible; only add clean overlay graphics and labels.

Add exactly 7 bold white uppercase labels with black outline/drop shadow: {argument name="west label" default="WEST"} at the upper center, {argument name="south label" default="SOUTH"} on the left, {argument name="seating label" default="PLAYER SEATING / MARKS"} above the two rocks, {argument name="zone label" default="ACTION / BATTLE ZONE"} centered on the dirt clearing, {argument name="front access label" default="OPEN ACCESS FRONT/LEFT/RIGHT"} along the bottom edge, plus "NO ARTIFICIAL OBJECTS" near the lower-left vegetation and "NATURAL VEGETATION" on the right side.

Add exactly 4 semi-transparent white arrows with black outlines: one large upward arrow under the WEST label, one large left-pointing arrow beside the SOUTH label, and two small diagonal arrows from the seating label pointing to the two stone seats/marks. Add thin cyan perspective guide lines outlining the usable area: a large trapezoid/field boundary following the clearing and vegetation edges, with a smaller inner trapezoid around the action/battle zone. Make the overlay look like a clear outdoor scene breakdown diagram, while preserving the original photographic quality and avoiding any extra objects, people, buildings, icons, or new scenery.

prompts.title: 漫画/分镜 - 雨中绣球花浪漫漫画页
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a polished two-panel shoujo manga page set in a rainy hydrangea garden, with cinematic sunlight after rain, delicate line art, soft watercolor coloring, and romantic-drama pacing.

Canvas: Vertical manga page in a 4:5 ratio, divided into exactly 2 horizontal panels with thin black borders: one wide top panel and one wide bottom panel. Use a refined Japanese romance manga style with highly detailed foliage, glossy wet stone path, bokeh sunlight, and gentle pastel colors.

Layout: Panel 1 occupies the top half. Show a tall young man on the right side, half-body view, standing beside a hydrangea-lined garden path after rain. He has a featureless softly blurred rectangular face area, tousled light brown hair, a pale blue open button-up shirt over a white T-shirt, a simple silver necklace, and a small black stud earring. On the left and foreground, show lush wet hydrangea bushes with exactly 9 prominent flower heads visible: 3 purple, 4 blue, and 2 pale lavender-pink. Add one vertical white narration box near the upper-left center.

Panel 2 occupies the bottom half. Use the same garden path, now with the young man in close-up on the left foreground, turned toward the right. Show the arriving young woman on the right midground walking toward him. She has a featureless softly blurred face area, long wavy light brown hair, a white sleeveless floral dress with a sheer white cardigan, and a small beige shoulder bag. In this panel show exactly 6 prominent hydrangea flower heads around the path: 2 purple, 3 blue, and 1 pink. Add exactly 2 text elements in panel 2: one vertical white narration box at the upper right and one white oval speech bubble between the characters, plus tiny red surprise marks near the woman.

Text content: Use Japanese vertical manga lettering. The top panel narration box should say {argument name="top narration text" default="雨上がりの紫陽花って\nなんでこんなに\nきれいなんだろう――"}. The bottom-right narration box should say {argument name="arrival narration text" default="――足音が聞こえて、\n彼女が来たのが分かった。"}. The speech bubble should say {argument name="speech bubble text" default="待ったー？\nごめん、ちょっと\n遅れちゃった！"}. Add a small handwritten breath sound beside the bubble reading {argument name="small sound effect" default="はぁ"}.

Subject details: The male character should look stylish and gentle, around early twenties, slim build, wearing the pale blue shirt with rolled sleeves. The female character should look romantic and soft, around early twenties, slim build, with a flowing white dress and delicate accessories. Keep both faces intentionally blank/blurred and do not draw facial features.

Visual style: Highly detailed anime-manga illustration, semi-realistic backgrounds, sparkling raindrops on leaves, warm morning sunlight filtering through trees, wet reflective path, soft depth of field, elegant shoujo romance atmosphere, clean panel borders, no watermark, no extra panels, no extra speech bubbles.

prompts.title: 信息图/教育视觉 - 单色AI工作室品牌套件封面
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a sleek monochrome brand guidelines cover for {argument name="brand name" default="UtopikAI Studio"}, presenting it as a premium AI studio visual identity system.

Canvas: Square 1:1 format, black charcoal background with subtle grain, faint vignette, and thin technical drafting lines. Use a minimal futuristic editorial layout with generous negative space.

Layout: Add a very thin rectangular border close to the canvas edges, with tiny corner ticks, small crosshair marks at the top center, left middle, right middle, and bottom center, and faint dotted vertical guide marks near both side edges. In the upper left, place small spaced uppercase text “UTOPIKAI STUDIO”; in the upper right, place “BRAND GUIDELINES”. In the center, build a large geometric construction grid: a 2-by-2 square grid with faint circular arc segments and quarter-circle curves, like logo construction guides. Overlay the main logo lockup across the middle-lower portion of this grid.

Logo lockup: Use a white abstract icon to the left, made from four square tiles containing curved quarter-circle cutouts, forming a symmetrical modern mark. To the right, set the wordmark “UtopikAI” in bold clean geometric sans serif, bright white, with “Studio” smaller and lighter aligned under the right side of the wordmark. Count exactly 2 logo elements: 1 abstract icon and 1 two-line wordmark.

Main title area: In the lower left quadrant, place the large title {argument name="document title" default="Brand Kit"} in white, set in a clean modern sans serif. Directly beneath it, add the subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="Visual identity system"} in smaller muted gray text. Under the subtitle, add one short thin horizontal white line and one longer very faint gray line.

Footer: Along the bottom edge, add small technical footer labels: left “VERSION 1.0”, center “VISUAL IDENTITY SYSTEM”, and right {argument name="year" default="2024"}. Connect the footer area with thin angular drafting lines and subtle horizontal rules.

Visual style: Premium black-and-white brand kit cover, minimalist, tech-luxury, precise Swiss grid design, high contrast white typography, subtle gray construction lines, crisp vector-like rendering, no mockup perspective.

Constraints: Use exactly 5 main text groups: top-left studio label, top-right guidelines label, central logo lockup, lower-left title/subtitle block, and bottom footer metadata. Keep all text sharp and legible. Avoid extra colors, photos, people, shadows, or decorative clutter.

prompts.title: 移动端 AI 对话截图与 Transformer 海报
prompts.prompt: 一张竖屏智能手机应用截图，展示了日语 AI 聊天界面，采用简洁的白色背景和 iOS 风格顶部栏。最上方显示左侧汉堡菜单图标、蓝色文字“Thinking”及右侧箭头、编辑撰写图标以及三点菜单。下方显示一个巨大的圆角浅灰色聊天气泡，包含 6 行日语文本，内容如下：「モーフ感浮遊感のある感じ＋かつ反射するダストのレイヤーを加えて。テキスト多め、重要ーアーキテクチャは可読性高め、精細で細かいコードや数式の可読性は二の次のデザインアクセント＆アートエレメンツで。」气泡下方显示一行浅灰色系统小字“Thought for a couple of seconds”，接着是一行较大的灰色日语文字“画像が作成されました”。在下半部分，展示 1 个圆角生成的图像缩略图：一张关于 Transformer 神经网络架构的密集型未来感信息图海报，渲染为发光的霓虹科幻全息 UI 艺术。海报背景为深邃的宇宙空间，带有星星、紫色、洋红色、蓝色和青色的光轨、反射粒子、体积光以及漂浮的几何晶体。海报左上角有大标题“TRANSFORMER”，副标题为“THE ARCHITECTURE”。包含 2 个巨大的中央发光框，分别标注为“ENCODER LAYER”和“DECODER LAYER”，通过箭头和较小的模块连接，标注为“ENCODER STACK (N×)”和“DECODER STACK (N×)”。添加许多周围的标注面板和公式，包括“KEY INNOVATIONS”、“WHY TRANSFORMERS?”、“POSITIONAL ENCODING”、“FEED FORWARD NETWORK”、“COMPUTATIONAL COMPLEXITY”、“OVERALL FLOW”、“SELF-ATTENTION MECHANISM”、“MULTI-HEAD ATTENTION”、“APPLICATIONS”和“MODEL SCALING”等部分。底部显示 Token 行，包括类似“[CLS] the cat sat on the mat [SEP]”的英语输入序列，以及以“[EOS]”结尾的类法语输出序列。通篇添加微小的图表、公式、注意力机制图和连线，但整体观感应偏向艺术化和发光效果，而非严格的可读性。在海报缩略图底部中心，叠加一个带有黑色向下箭头的白色圆形下载按钮。整体截图应呈现出真实的移动端 ChatGPT 风格界面，展示 AI 生成的图像结果，清晰且现代。

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 技术工程产品信息图
prompts.prompt:
Design a branded technical infographic of a {argument name="subject" default="[SNACK]"} that overlays architectural-style annotations onto a realistic product photograph or photoreal render. Place everything on a pure white studio background, with black ink linework as the primary technical language and strategic {argument name="brand color" default="[BRAND COLOR]"} accents (engineer-sketch energy on premium packaging).

Layer the following annotations on top of the product:
• Labels calling out every key component
• An internal cross-section that reveals layering, structure, or internal design
• Dimensions, measurements, and product specifications
• Material callouts listing composition and quantities
• Arrows pointing to primary features and structural details
• A small schematic or sectional diagram showing mechanical / design logic
• Sustainability callouts
Set the product name in bold font inside a hand-drawn annotation box with an accent-color border, anchored in an upper corner as the title.

Style and layout rules:
• Keep the realistic product fully visible underneath all the linework
• Annotations should read as sketched, technical, and architectural
• About 70-80% black linework for primary technical lines, 20-30% {argument name="accent color" default="[BRAND COLOR]"} for accent highlights
• Balanced composition with generous negative space
• Educational food-engineering tone with premium brand polish
• Drop a subtle brand logo mark in one corner

Visual style: minimal technical-illustration aesthetic, black linework with accent color over realistic imagery, precise but with a slightly hand-drawn feel.
Color palette: white background, black annotation lines and text, [BRAND COLOR] reserved for accents and key callouts only.
Output: 1080×1080, ultra-crisp, optimized for social feeds, no watermark.

prompts.title: YouTube 缩略图 - 樱花旅行电影感标题卡
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a vibrant Japanese travel-video title card for a short-form prompt collection, combining a cinematic spring travel photo background with glossy neon UI graphics.

Canvas: Horizontal 16:9 image, 1152×768 feel, high-resolution, bright pastel color grading, soft bloom and lens flare.

Background: A young woman traveler stands on the right side at a train platform beside a modern train, viewed from behind/three-quarter back, face intentionally obscured by a plain skin-tone rectangular blur. She has long wavy dark brown hair, wears a light beige trench coat, carries a tan shoulder bag, and holds the handle of a small rolling suitcase near the bottom center. The setting is a dreamy cherry-blossom station in spring, with pink sakura trees filling the left and upper background, scattered falling petals, warm sunlight, and shallow depth of field.

Main graphic layout: Place a large rounded gradient banner across the left-center, extending toward the woman. The banner uses a blue-to-purple-to-pink translucent glossy gradient with a large circular badge on the far left. Inside the circle, display a huge white number {argument name="section number" default="4."}. To the right of the circle, set bold rounded Japanese headline text in white: {argument name="headline text" default="旅行・季節・青春シネマ"}. Below it, add a smaller white rounded pill label with purple-pink text: {argument name="subtitle text" default="情緒・旅感・短編向け"}.

Visible text count: exactly 3 text elements: 1 large number badge reading "4.", 1 main Japanese headline reading "旅行・季節・青春シネマ", and 1 subtitle pill reading "情緒・旅感・短編向け".

Neon icon overlay count: exactly 9 glowing white-pink line icons and decorative elements around the banner and right side: 1 suitcase icon at upper left, 1 cherry blossom icon near upper center-left, 1 camera icon above the banner, 1 play button icon inside a rounded rectangle on the upper right, 1 clapperboard icon on the mid-right, 1 signpost arrow icon at lower left, 1 dotted travel path sweeping along the lower left-to-center, 1 map pin near the end of the dotted path, and 2 small sparkle/star accents near the top center and right side. Keep all icons semi-transparent, neon outlined, and softly glowing.

Style: Japanese social-media thumbnail design, cute travel aesthetic, glossy gradient panels, soft pink and lavender atmosphere, cinematic bokeh, dreamy sakura petals, clean rounded typography, bright white text with subtle glow, polished promotional-card composition.

Constraints: Keep the woman on the right and the graphic title block on the left, do not add extra text, do not add logos or watermarks, keep the face covered by a simple rectangular blur, and maintain a cheerful spring travel mood.

prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a dark cinematic storyboard/contact sheet for an action-fantasy steampunk sequence starring {argument name="character name" default="Kai"}, continuing from a previous final frame with no reset: same stormy refinery environment, same lighting, same character position and wardrobe continuity.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 storyboard sheet, approximately 1200×675, black background with thin black gutters. Arrange exactly 12 widescreen panels in a 4-column by 3-row grid. Each panel has a cinematic frame above and a black caption strip below with small condensed white uppercase type, including a numbered shot title and two short description lines.

Visual style: Gritty high-detail concept art, dark dieselpunk/steampunk industrial fantasy, ash-filled sky, brown-black metal palette, orange power-cell glow, lightning-like energy arcs, smoke, dust, sparks, ruined refinery towers, massive machinery, collapsing platforms, dramatic low-key lighting, dynamic camera angles, film storyboard presentation.

Main character details: Kai is a spiky-haired young male warrior in ragged layered tactical clothing: dark cloak, straps, leather armor, metal gauntlets, utility belts, wind-torn scarf or coat tails, soot and grime on face, intense expression. He carries or activates a glowing cylindrical power cell with orange core energy. Keep him consistent across all panels.

Storyboard layout and text content: Include exactly 12 discrete panels with these labels and visible descriptions:

01. CONTINUATION - FINAL FRAME HOLD
Kai stands atop the refinery tower, type-R power cell activated.
Storm clouds gather. Wind builds.

02. CLOSE ON KAI
The power cell glows brighter.
Surface cracks. Pressure symbols illuminate.

03. EXTREME MACRO
Mechanical seams open.
Energy leaks. Electric arcs dance.

04. WIDE ENVIRONMENTAL
Distant refinery towers activate one by one.
Industrial lights ignite across the horizon.

05. LOW ANGLE
Massive smokestacks erupt, pressure valves release steam.
Ancient machinery awakens.

06. MEDIUM SHOT
Kai shields from the shockwave.
Coat and straps violently whip.

07. DYNAMIC SHOT
The platform beneath Kai begins to collapse.
Metal fractures spread.

08. HEROIC LEAP
Kai jumps from the collapsing tower.
Huge scale. Industrial city behind him.

09. TRACKING SHOT
Kai lands on a moving crane arm.
Debris falls through frame.

10. WIDE REVEAL
The ground erupts.
A gigantic industrial salvage automaton emerges.

11. EXTREME WIDE
Kai is tiny.
The automaton towers over the refinery wastes.

12. FINAL ICONIC SHOT
Kai raises the pneumatic cutter.
Power cell energy flows through the weapon.
The titan is fully awakened.
Dust storm engulfs the refinery city.

Shot-specific imagery: Panel 1 shows Kai from behind on a high circular railing overlooking a vast industrial wasteland, holding a small orange glowing cylinder. Panel 2 is a close-up of his gloved hand holding the glowing power cell near his face, with one soft blurred vertical rectangle obscuring part of the face area. Panel 3 is an extreme close-up of a metal machine surface marked with a large R, glowing orange cracks and arcs. Panel 4 shows a wide refinery skyline with many towers lighting up. Panel 5 uses a low angle on smokestacks venting steam and flame. Panel 6 shows Kai bracing against a violent blast with debris flying. Panel 7 shows a collapsing steel platform and tiny Kai amid fractured girders. Panel 8 shows Kai suspended mid-leap surrounded by shattered debris. Panel 9 tracks him crouched on a crane arm with chains and falling rubble. Panel 10 reveals a huge circular mechanical automaton head or torso rising from dust, orange core glowing. Panel 11 is an extreme wide silhouette of Kai on a bridge facing the towering automaton. Panel 12 is the heroic finale with Kai standing foreground, orange power glowing through his raised weapon, giant machine and refinery chaos behind him.

Constraints: Use exactly 12 panels, exactly the listed captions, no extra panels, no logos or watermarks.
